---
title: ""
---

# News

This page will document research updates, presentations, outreach events, publications, fieldwork, and professional milestones.

## 2026

### Personal academic website launched

This website was created as a central space for my research, teaching, outreach, publications, projects, and reproducible science portfolio.

### Human *Toxoplasma gondii* epidemiology project

The human *Toxoplasma gondii* epidemiology project is being prepared for manuscript development. The project uses diagnostic records from Puerto Rico to assess exposure patterns and contribute to One Health research on the island.

### Manatee Project Puerto Rico

The Manatee Project Puerto Rico continues to develop as a research program focused on environmental transmission pathways of *Toxoplasma gondii* and potential implications for the endangered Antillean manatee.

## Future updates

This section will eventually include:

- Manuscript submissions
- Conference presentations
- Funding announcements
- Fieldwork updates
- Outreach events
- New GitHub repositories
- New protocols
- Teaching resources
